reviews.comment:
No es lo que era antes,,. Salvo en temporada se ve muy desolado servicios y atenciones básicas el buen rango... La parte de buffet y cafetería surtida semi autoservicio y buena calidad comidas básicas lo clásico y elemental

(Translated by Google)
It's not what it used to be... Except during peak season, it looks very desolate. Basic services and attention are lacking, though the overall quality is good. The buffet and cafeteria are well-stocked, semi-self-service, and the food is basic, classic, and simple.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Daniel. Tomaremos tu comentario par analizar.
